title: Powering next generation applications with OpenAI Codex
titleZh: 使用OpenAI Codex为下一代应用提供支持
summary: Codex is now powering 70 different applications across a variety of use cases through the OpenAI API.
summaryZh: Codex现在通过OpenAI API在各种用例中为70种不同的应用程序提供支持。
highlights: Codex is now powering 70 different applications across a variety of use cases through the OpenAI API.
highlightsZh: Codex现在通过OpenAI API在各种用例中为70种不同的应用程序提供支持。

title: DALL·E 2 research preview update
summary: Early users have created over 3 million images to date and helped us improve our safety processes. We’re excited to begin adding up to 1,000 new users from our waitlist each week.
summaryZh: 迄今为止，早期用户已创建了300多万张图片，并帮助我们改进了安全流程。我们很高兴每周都能从等待名单中添加多达1,000名新用户。
highlights: Early users have created over 3 million images to date and helped us improve our safety processes.
We’re excited to begin adding up to 1,000 new users from our waitlist each week.
highlightsZh: 迄今为止，早期用户已创建了300多万张图片，并帮助我们改进了安全流程。我们很高兴每周都能从等待名单中添加多达1,000名新用户。

title: OpenAI leadership team update
summary: We’re happy to announce several executive role changes that reflect our recent progress and will ensure continued momentum toward our next major milestones.
summaryZh: 我们很高兴地宣布几项高管职位变动，这些变动反映了我们最近的进展，并将确保我们继续朝着下一个重要里程碑迈进。
highlights: We’re happy to announce several executive role changes that reflect our recent progress and will ensure continued momentum toward our next major milestones.
